calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Oct-22-2025 Discharged
MINI MINUTES: This matter is on calendar for an Order of Examination field by Judgment Creditor Blake Bobosky as to Judgment Debtor Brondell Inc.

Blake Bobosky appeared represented by James M. Johnson and Kajsa Minor
Brondell Inc. appeared represented by Steven Scheer.

Order of Examination commenced.

Order of Examination was concluded and this matter is discharged.
